title: Anticipation
content:
When I grow up I mean to be
    A Lion large and fierce to see.
    I'll mew so loud that Cook in fright
    Will give me all the cream in sight.
    And anyone who dares to say
    "Poor Puss" to me will rue the day.
    Then having swallowed him I'll creep
    Into the Guest Room Bed to sleep.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "Anticipation"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
